meadow.name: Green Meadow
meadow.desc: A page sketched with rolling hills and lazy clouds.

graveyard.name: Graveyard
graveyard.desc: Mossy headstones and restless spirits. The dead do not stay buried here.

dark_dungeon.name: Dark Dungeon
dark_dungeon.desc: Ancient stones etched with runes. The dead do not rest here.

void_dimension.name: Void Dimension
void_dimension.desc: A fracture in reality. Only the chosen may enter. Requires a Key of the Void.
